SELECT uudecode(encoded_string, 0) FROM test_encoded_data WHERE encoded_string LIKE ':%';
SELECT DISTINCT uudecode(encoded_string, 1) AS decoded FROM test_encoded_data ORDER BY decoded;

SELECT uudecode(encoded_string, 0) AS decoded1, uudecode(encoded_string, 1) AS decoded2 FROM test_encoded_data WHERE encoded_string IN (SELECT encoded_string FROM test_encoded_data WHERE encoded_string LIKE ':%');

SELECT uudecode(ud1 + ud2, 0) FROM (SELECT uudecode(encoded_string, 0) AS ud1 FROM test_encoded_data) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT uudecode(encoded_string, 1) AS ud2 FROM test_encoded_data) AS t2 ON ud1 IS NOT NULL AND ud2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT uudecode(encoded_string, 0) FROM test_encoded_data WHERE encoded_string=':7''abc''def:') AS single_section, (SELECT uudecode(encoded_string, 0) FROM test_encoded_data) AS all_sections;
INSERT INTO decoded_results (result_text) SELECT uudecode(encoded_string, 0) FROM test_encoded_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decoded_results WHERE result_text IS NOT NULL;
